abilities.name: pickup
abilities.description: Picks up other Pokémon's used and Flung held items. May also pick up an item after battle.

abilities.name: technician
abilities.description: Strengthens moves of 60 base power or less to 1.5× their power.

effectChanges.description: struggle is unaffected. helping hand and defense curl are not taken into account.

abilities.name: unnerve
abilities.description: Prevents opposing Pokémon from eating held Berries.
